home.badge: Bridging the gap in rare diseases
home.subtitle: An AI-powered health intelligence platform that turns a family's medical reality into a structured, actionable clinical identity. Connect with support you didn't know existed.
home.failuresSubtitle: Rare diseases are problems of uncertainty, invisibility, and survival.
home.diagnosticFailureDesc: Conditions are frequently misdiagnosed for years. Symptoms overlap, specialists are scarce.
home.accessFailureDesc: Ecosystems of support exist, but they are fragmented, hidden, and entirely undiscoverable.
home.careFailureDesc: Day-to-day caregiving involves constant, high-stakes decisions made with no guidance.

dashboard.subtitle: Seu companheiro para doenças raras. Em que nos concentramos hoje?
dashboard.cardDiagnoseDesc: AI matches your symptoms against the Orphanet rare disease dataset.
dashboard.cardLifeAssistDesc: Ranked financial aid, NGO support, medical access, and assistive tech.
dashboard.cardClinicalDesc: Your structured clinical identity — symptoms, timeline, and reports.
dashboard.cardCommunityDesc: Connect with families navigating the same rare disease journey.
dashboard.cardCareDesc: AI-powered medical assistant grounded in WHO, NIH, Orphanet & India NHM.

care_ai.title: Assistente de cuidados
care_ai.disclaimer: Apenas informação educacional. Não substitui aconselhamento médico.
care_ai.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
care_ai.suggested_q_0: What are the key symptoms I should monitor for my condition?
care_ai.suggested_q_1: What government schemes are available for rare disease patients in India?
care_ai.suggested_q_2: What is enzyme replacement therapy and how does it work?
care_ai.suggested_q_3: How do I obtain a disability certificate in India?
care_ai.suggested_q_4: What should I do during an acute metabolic crisis?
care_ai.suggested_q_5: What are the first aid steps for a seizure?
care_ai.suggested_q_6: What specialists should I see for my disease?
care_ai.suggested_q_7: What is Ayushman Bharat coverage for rare diseases?

community.title: Inteligência comunitária
community.subtitle: Connect with families navigating similar clinical markers and life stages.
community.noCirclesYet: Você ainda não entrou em nenhum círculo.
community.noDiscussions: No discussions here yet. Be the first to share!
community.joinCircleToView: Join a circle from "Explore More" to view and share discussions!
community.readOnlyMode: Read-only mode. Sign in to post and interact.
community.duplicateTitle: This might have been answered before.
community.duplicateDesc: Review similar past discussions before posting to get immediate answers.
community.emergencyDesc: We noticed keywords like "bleeding won't stop". The community cannot provide emergency medical advice.
community.importantNoticeDesc: This structured network helps connect similar experiences. Always consult a professional before changing care routines based on peer advice.
community.emergencyWarning: In severe distress, contact your lead physician or emergency services immediately.
community.exploreSubtitle: Discover structured circles based on clinical markers.
community.placeholder_logged_in: Share an experience, ask a question, or provide an insight...
community.deleteComment: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
community.circle_swelling_desc: Managing severe fluid retention and vascular issues.
community.circle_pain_desc: Strategies for chronic pain and limited mobility.
community.circle_neuro_desc: Coping with seizures, neuropathy, and migraines.

life_assist.title: Assistência de vida
life_assist.subtitle: Choose the support area you want to explore.
life_assist.catEducation_desc: IEPs, home schooling, special educator access
life_assist.catMedical_desc: Specialist connects, second opinions, medicine aid
life_assist.helpRequestedDesc: Every support request you have created across all Life Assist categories appears here.
life_assist.noRequests: Sem solicitações ainda. Abra uma categoria para começar.

clinical_profile.uploadDocsHint: Upload your medical reports, prescriptions, or test results.
